economic_notes: First Nation holds investments in Wahkohtowin Development LP (33.33%), Three Nations Drilling LP (33.33%), Mushkegowuk Regional Economic Development LP (14.28%), Northeast Superior First Nations Investment LP (33.33%), and 2680985 LP (33.33%), all accounted for by modified equity method. Financial information for these enterprises was not available for year ended March 31, 2021, resulting in qualified audit opinion.
notes: Audit is qualified because financial information for First Nation business enterprises (modified equity method) was not available for years ended March 31, 2021 and 2020, so the investment balance, share of earnings, accumulated surplus, net financial assets, and annual surplus may require adjustment. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Per capita distributions of $2,071,248 paid to members are a notable large expense item. COVID-19 note included. OSR calculation includes Gas Bar sales, Other revenue, Share of earnings from business enterprises, and Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership revenue as own-source; government transfers include ISC ($3,853,500), CMHC ($91,625), and Ministry of Health ($175,819) totalling $4,120,944 — Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership treated as own-source as it appears to be a revenue-sharing partnership distribution rather than a direct government transfer. Revised total_government_transfers set to ISC + CMHC + Ministry of Health = 4,120,944.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
